WITN08500100

Witness Name: Mandy Talbot
Statement No: WITN08500100
Dated: 31 of May 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF MANDY TALBOT

I, MANDY TALBOT, will say as follows;

1. I have been asked to provide a Rule 9 Witness Statement addressing the questions set out in the Annex to the Rule 9 Request sent to me on the 14th of April 2023.

2. I have been assisted by DAC Beachcroft LLP in the preparation and drafting of my statement.

Background

3. I have a BCS Econ in Law and Politics 2;1 from Aberystwyth University and a Masters in Commercial Law from Bristol University. After working at Cameron McKenna's and Wilde Sapte I joined the Post Office Solicitors Office as a Legal Assistant in January of 1990 in the Civil Litigation Department.

Page 1 of 42
